Class StandardLinearAlgebraProvider<E>

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.providers.CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.providers.StandardLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<E>, AlgorithmProvider, Backend, ComputeBackend, CPUBackend
@AutoService(LinearAlgebraProvider.class) public class StandardLinearAlgebraProvider<E> extends CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Standard (Naive/Recursive) algorithm. Intended for benchmarking and comparison purposes.
